name: Code Execute Tool
description: Execute code and manage files. Create, modify, delete files. Run shell commands.

name: FileSystem Tool
description: Robust file I/O operations with error handling.

name: Web Search Tool
description: Search the web for real-time information. Extract and summarize content.

name: HTTP Request Tool
description: Make HTTP requests to external APIs and services.

name: Memory Store Tool
description: Store information in NEXUS memory system.

name: Memory Retrieve Tool
description: Retrieve memories from NEXUS memory system.

name: Memory Bank
description: Long-term persistent memory for learning and preferences.

name: LLM Chat
description: Large language model integration for reasoning and generation.

name: Code Sandbox
description: Safe code execution environment for JavaScript/TypeScript.

name: Text Analysis Tool
description: Analyze text for patterns, statistics, and insights.

name: Self Improvement
description: Ability to analyze and improve own codebase.
